title: The Big Cheese Anti Mouse Sachets 5 pks & Anti Mouse Refresher Spray 500ml (Natural, Poison & Chemical 30 day Rodent Deterrent)
features: Refresher spray for rat and mouse repellent sachets is scented with peppermint. The strong mint smell is repugnant to rats and mice, deterring them from causing damage in households
Poison and chemical-free refresher spray can be sprayed onto rodent deterrent sachets, then placed where food is stored to deter rats and mice from the home
Safe for use around children and pets, the all-natural formulation repels rats and mice without the use of chemicals
Rat and mouse repellent sachets contain wheat, scented with peppermint, the strong mint smell is repugnant to rats and mice, deterring them from causing damage in households
Poison and chemical-free rodent deterrent sachets can be placed in living areas, especially where food is stored to deter rats and mice from the home
description: From the manufacturer Long-lasting protection Rodent Control Made Easy When mice and rats move in, it's time to bring in The Big Cheese! Choose from a comprehensive range of tried and tested traps, deterrents and baits within 4 straight-forward methods of control. Catch & Kill: Conventional spring traps with a powerful snap and hold. Bait & Kill: Our Home Choice range KILLS RATS & MICE. WITH 50% LESS POISON. Catch Alive: Live-catch traps that provide a humane alternative to lethal methods. Repel: 24/7 repellent protection from rodents. Poison-free and safe for use around children. Anti Mouse Refresher Spray - 500ml from The Big Cheese Anti Mouse Refresher Spray and Scent Sachets are safe for use in all living areas, including kitchens, closets, cupboards, basements, attics, garages, sheds, vehicles, caravans, boats, etc. All natural Anti Mouse Refresher Spray from The Big Cheese contains a specially-formulated blend of mint oils that will destroy rodent odours and disrupt their pheromone trails within vulnerable areas of your home. Anti Mouse Refresher Spray can be used alongside traditional controls such as traps and baits to rid the home of rodent pests and their unpleasant odours. Part of the comprehensive range of products from The Big Cheese Destroys unpleasant odours and disrupts rodent pheromone trails. All-natural formulation with powerful mint aroma. Effective for up to 30 days. Welfare-friendly deterrent. Suitable for use in home living areas, especially food storage, and small space treatments. Safe for use around children and pets. Use to refresh Anti Mouse Scent Sachets purchased separately. Product Highlights Portable Protection Quick and easy room protection for homes, sheds, lofts, holiday homes, caravans and areas left unattended for periods of time. Refresh The Big Cheese Anti Mouse Refresher Spray is effective for 30 days. Use to refresh The Big Cheese Anti Mouse Scent Sachets (purchased separately). Child & Pet Safe Safe for use around children and pets, this humane product destroys unpleasant odours and disrupts pheromone trails, ridding your home of rodent pests. Our all-natural formulations are ideal for use in the home environment, including food storage areas. 100% Natural All natural formulation with a powerful natural aroma. Product Highlights Portable Protection Quick and easy room protection for homes, sheds, lofts, holiday homes, caravans and areas left unattended for periods of time. Refresh The Big Cheese Anti Mouse Scent Sachets are effective for 30 days at which point they can be easily refreshed using The Big Cheese Anti Mouse Refresher Spray (STV405) purchased separately. Child & Pet Safe Safe for use around children and pets, these humane products destroy unpleasant odours and disrupt pheromone trails, ridding your home of rodent pests. Our all-natural formulations are ideal for use in the home environment, including food storage areas. 100% Natural All natural formulation with a powerful natural mint aroma. Anti Mouse - Welfare-friendly rodent control Rodent Problems No-one likes the thought of a mouse or rat in their home so spotting the signs early can help avoid larger infestations. Look out for: droppings, gnaw marks, scratches, dead or live rodents, smells, noises and unusual pet behaviour. Choose the control method from The Big Cheese that's right for you. For immediate problems and prevent return, seal gaps in walls, remove food sources and use repellent products from The Big Cheese. Poison-free Pest Control Our all-natural formulations are ideal for use in the home environment, including food storage areas. Maximise your poison-free protection and use The Big Cheese Anti Mouse Scent Sachets in conjunction with the mini & mighty Anti Mouse Mini Sonic Mouse Repellents. See comparison chart below for more details. Advanced Ultrasonic Technology Ultrasonic sound waves do not cause harm, but create an acoustically hostile zone (as if a marching band moved in next door) which rodents find uncomfortable, driving them away from the protected area. Our range of new generation ultrasonic repellers are specially engineered to repel rodent pests from living areas, operating on varying volumes and frequencies to ensure rodents cannot begin to tolerate the sound within the protected environment.
